description: Farm animals, mounts, and working beasts bred for service to civilization.
creatures: Horse
A sleek, powerful steed that bonds deeply with its rider and gallops until its heart gives out.
Warhorse
A broad-chested destrier trained to charge into spear walls and kick with iron-shod hooves.
Pony
A stocky, stubborn mount that picks its way over mountain trails where larger horses stumble.
Mule
A tough crossbreed with legendary stubbornness and the endurance to haul loads across deserts.
Donkey
A patient pack animal with a braying voice and surprising cleverness behind its mild eyes.
Ox
A broad-shouldered draft beast that plods forward with unstoppable, patient strength.
Cow
A placid, lowing beast that chews its cud in green fields and startles at sudden noise.
Bull
A thick-necked brute with lowered horns that charges anything entering its territory.
Goat
A nimble climber that scales near-vertical cliffs and chews through rope, leather, and fences alike.
Sheep
A woolly, bleating herd animal that follows its flock blindly, even off a cliff edge.
Pig
A keen-nosed, clever beast that roots through anything and can be trained like a dog.
Chicken
A clucking barnyard bird that scratches for grubs and squawks in alarm at any shadow overhead.
Duck
A quacking waterfowl that paddles across ponds and waddles comically on land.
Goose
A loud, hissing waterfowl that attacks intruders with fearless aggression and battering wings.
Dog
A loyal canine companion with keen nose and fierce devotion to its chosen human.
Cat
An independent feline hunter that keeps vermin away and bestows its affection on its own terms.
Falcon
A hooded raptor trained for the hunt, capable of diving at blinding speed to strike its quarry.
Pigeon
A reliable messenger bird that finds its way home across kingdoms and through storms.
Ferret
A sinuous little hunter that darts into burrows after rabbits and wriggles through impossibly small holes.
Mastiff
A barrel-chested guard dog with a deep growl and jaws that clamp down and never let go.
Duckling
A tiny ball of yellow down that imprints on the first thing it sees and follows in a wobbling line.
